design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed derived from title + niche_landing + ecommerce operators + generated_at, selected design_architecture=workflow-command-center, typography=Satoshi, components=[workflow-playbook-timeline, gapless-bento-grid, source-card-dossier], GSAP paradigms=[pinned-chapter-scroll, hover-physics]. AIDA Check: Hero captures operational pain, proof builds credibility, desire shown via workflows and cache reuse, action via CTAs. Font Selection: Satoshi for operational clarity. Hero Math Verification: H1 max-width supports 2–3 lines at clamp sizes. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow:dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: scroll pin + hover physics guarded. Label Sweep & Button Check: all CTAs high-contrast, primary links verified.
headline: Super for ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin

site_brief.audience: ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin AI assistant
ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin

summary: A premium niche landing page for ecommerce operators who live inside order dashboards, inboxes, and admin tools. This page shows how Super’s personal AI agents operate real computers, reuse a computer-use cache for repeated workflows, and reduce the drag of order monitoring, customer support triage, and repetitive back-office tasks. Includes a long-form field guide, concrete ecommerce workflows, structured data, and market context grounded in current reporting.
